summary: Supplier Credentials Management (Iteration 79) - All 22 backend API tests PASS (100%), Frontend fully functional with all 3 supplier cards working. Multi-tenant supplier credential management with AES encryption verified: WWTatil (5 fields), Paximum (2 fields), AviationStack (2 fields). Connection testing returns FAIL verdict with fake credentials (expected behavior - real creds needed for PASS).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/supplier-credentials/supported returns 3 suppliers (wwtatil, paximum, aviationstack) with correct required_fields
POST /api/supplier-credentials/save validates required fields per supplier and returns error for missing fields
GET /api/supplier-credentials/my returns masked credentials (****) for sensitive fields, base_url shown in full
POST /api/supplier-credentials/test/{supplier} correctly returns FAIL verdict with fake credentials - expected behavior
Encryption: Credentials stored encrypted in DB using AES-256 via Fernet, decrypted on retrieval
Frontend Supplier Settings tab properly integrated in PlatformHardeningPage with green highlight
WWTatil card correctly shows 5 input fields with proper labels and icons
Paximum and AviationStack cards correctly show 2 input fields each
After save, Test Connection/Edit/Remove buttons appear as expected
Test Connection shows PASS/FAIL verdict with latency and error details

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Supplier Settings tab visible, all 3 supplier cards functional, save/test/delete flow works)

seed_data_creation: None - test uses fake credentials that are cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Credentials Management fully implemented and tested. All 9 API endpoints working. Frontend has Supplier Settings tab with 3 cards (WWTatil, Paximum, AviationStack). Credential save/test/delete flow verified. Connection test returns FAIL with fake creds (expected - real API creds needed for PASS). Encryption uses AES-256 via Fernet library.

features_verified.GET_supported: PASS - Returns 3 suppliers with correct required_fields (wwtatil:5, paximum:2, aviationstack:2)
features_verified.GET_my: PASS - Returns agency credentials with masked sensitive fields
features_verified.POST_save_wwtatil: PASS - Saves 5-field credentials (base_url, application_secret_key, username, password, agency_id)
features_verified.POST_test_wwtatil: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected behavior)
features_verified.POST_test_paximum: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected behavior)
features_verified.POST_test_aviationstack: PASS - Returns FAIL verdict with fake creds (expected behavior)
features_verified.DELETE_credential: PASS - Returns deleted:true, subsequent GET shows empty
features_verified.Encryption: PASS - Credentials stored encrypted, decrypted on retrieval
features_verified.Frontend_Tab: PASS - Supplier Settings tab visible and clickable in Platform Hardening page
features_verified.Frontend_WWTatil_Card: PASS - Shows 5 input fields with Save Credentials button
features_verified.Frontend_Paximum_Card: PASS - Shows 2 input fields with Save Credentials button
features_verified.Frontend_AviationStack_Card: PASS - Shows 2 input fields with Save Credentials button
features_verified.Frontend_Save_Flow: PASS - After save, Test Connection/Edit/Remove buttons appear
features_verified.Frontend_Test_Result: PASS - Shows FAIL verdict with latency (expected with fake creds)

wwtatil_adapter_verified.notes: WWTatil adapter makes real HTTP calls. With fake credentials, auth fails as expected.

mocked_note: No mocked APIs. WWTatil/Paximum/AviationStack adapters make real HTTP calls. Connection test with fake creds returns FAIL (correct behavior - real supplier credentials needed for PASS).
